narrative.narrative: As the market treads water in a sideways regime, reminiscent of May 2022's LUNA crash aftermath, BTC hovers around $60K amidst low volatility and extreme fear. Traders maintain caution while watching for signs of capitulation or unexpected catalyst.
narrative.headline: Bitcoin's Sideways Standoff: Fear Keeps Traders on Edge
